subject: phonics
activity_templates: A Pre-K letter recognition worksheet. One uppercase and one lowercase letter displayed huge at the top. Below, a grid of 6 cute cartoon objects — the child circles only the ones that start with that letter. {{character}} points at the big letter.

A find-the-letter worksheet: a fun cartoon scene where the target letter is hidden five times in different sizes and colors. Child circles each letter. {{character}} holds a magnifying glass in the scene.
A match-uppercase-to-lowercase worksheet. Left column: 5 uppercase letters. Right column: 5 lowercase letters jumbled. Child draws lines to match pairs. {{character}} waves between the columns.

An 'ABC sort' worksheet. Two boxes: one labeled with a target letter, one labeled 'Not {letter}'. Below, 6 cartoon pictures. Child circles pictures that start with the target letter. {{character}} cheers.
